name: Italian Brown Rice Croquettes
recipeIngredient: 2 celery ribs, with leaves, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, bring the water to a boil over medium-high heat. Add the rice, cover, and return to the boil. Immediately reduce the heat to low and simmer until the water is absorbed, 30 to 40 minutes.
2. Meanwhile, in a large skillet, heat the oil over medium heat. Add the celery, onion, garlic and cook until softened, about 6 minutes. Transfer to a large bowl.
3. Put the tofu, vegetable stock, oats and soy sauce in a blender and blend until smooth. Add the parsley, basil, black pepper, and cayenne and pulse until blended. Stir into the onion mixture.
4. Add the cooked rice to the onion mixture, along with the whole wheat bread crumbs and black olives, and mix well.
5. Preheat the oven to 400°F (200°C). Lightly oil a baking sheet.
6. Shape the rice mixture into 2-inch balls for a main dish or 1-inch balls for an appetizer. Roll each ball in the herbed bread crumbs, pressing to make the crumbs adhere, and place the croquettes on the baking sheet.
7. Bake until lightly browned, 20 to 30 minutes.
8. Arrange the croquettes on a serving platter and serve the Nutty Basil Pesto on the side.
